svg.aria-label: Weekly digest cover 2026.02.12: Outlook Add-In Theft, APT36 SideCopy RAT, 60+ Vendor Patch Tuesday
svg.title: Weekly digest 2026-02-12: Outlook addin creds, APT36 SideCopy RAT, 60+ vendor patches

g.text: Malicious Outlook addin steals creds via session token hook
Cross-platform RAT campaign targets Windows, Linux, macOS
Largest synchronized patch wave hits OS and infra vendors
